description.unified: Leaps into the air and deals Physical Damage to enemies in range, stunning them for [2sec->5 sec].

Deals Physical Damage proportional to Clause's P.DEF to enemies in range and knocks them back. Reduces Hit enemies' All DEF by 30% and ATK Spd by [20%->500] for [4sec->20 sec], respectively. When Clause successfully blocks an attack, reduces this Skill's Cooldown by 0.5 sec. [(removed) reduces their ATK by 25%.]
Increases All allies' Physical DEF, P.Crit Resistance by [(added) 300], and reduces Physical Damage they take by [10%->25%] for [14sec->20 sec]. [(removed) increases Physical Block Chance by 150.]

Upon blocking, deals Physical Damage to frontal enemies, decreases ATK of affected targets by [3.5% (up to 4 stacks)->20%] for [6sec->8 sec] and recovers own Mana by [(added) 300]. When an ally excluding self takes DMG, increases all allies' P.DEF by 20% and P.Crit Resistance by 200 for 5 sec. This effect only activates once every 10 sec. [(removed) increases your Physical DEF by 9% up to 4 stacks.]

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, the skill has a 100% chance to draw the target in.

light.unified: Target takes 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec. [(removed) On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.]

dark.unified: Increases P.Block Chance by [100->250] for the duration of Skill.

light.unified: Increases All DMG the hit target takes by 20% for 10 sec and has 10 sec Cooldown. [(removed) On block, the Attack reduction effect and Physical Defense increase effect are changed to stack up to 6 times.]

dark.unified: Reduce an additional 10% of ATK. [(removed) Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec.]

description.unified: [Cut Ground] Increases All DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec, and recovers own Mana by 400 per every hit enemy. [(removed) reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 1 sec.]
[Shield Strike] Reduces All Crit Resistance of the affected enemy by [P.Crit Resist by 210->500] and Crit Chance by {0} for [4 sec->10 sec]. [(removed) reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 25%.]
[Guardian Shield] Upon activation, removes negative effects on self, and DEF boost is increased by {0}%. [(removed) increases effect duration by 4.5 sec.]
[Vow of Knights] Upon activation, heals HP by [???%->2%] of Max HP, and increases own P.DEF by {0}% for [3 sec->5 sec].

dark.unified: At the beginning of each battle, increases ATK of all allies by [Max HP by 10%->15%]. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable.

description.unified: Upon casting an active skill 3 times, increases P.DEF and ATK for all allies by {0}% for 15 sec. ATK boost is doubled for the ally with the highest ATK.
